description: Style Note One of the world's largest denim-wear Brands lee definitely knows how to craft their denims. This Summer the brand presents a range of denim jeans that you will want to live in. Its blended fabric composition ensures a super-stretchy feel that is guaranteed to not stretch -out over time. tops, t-shirts, tunics..... Whatever you pair it, a lot of complements will definitely come your way. Product Details Black denim jeans, two scoop pockets in front with leather strip detail, embroidered branding on right, yoke and two patch pockets at the back with arquette embroidery, waistband with loops, zippered fly with button, PU patch with branding at back waistband Material and Care Cotton blend Machine wash cold Warm iron Size and Fit Extra low rise, slim and super skinny fit The model( height 5'8"and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
